summary:
The composition includes calcium hydroxide combined with an unspecified other ingredient; based on common practices, it most closely aligns with calcium hydroxide paired with iodoform from the available choices. Summary:

Metapex contains calcium hydroxide mixed with another substance, commonly inferred to be iodoform due to its frequent use in dental applications for root canal treatments. Given the context and usual formulations, this matches best with option C.
